features.canonicalInvariant: Heightfield waves and normals derive from the same water state.
features.kept: shared wave identity in baked map set
features.lost: live drop propagation and object-driven ripples
features.implementation: generate NoColorSpace height/normal/caustic texture sequence offline
features.validation: compare baked no-post water, height/normal parity manifest, and dispose/recreate texture counts

features.canonicalInvariant: Timing evidence separates GPU timestamp timing from CPU proxy timing.
features.kept: fixed sample window and CPU timing label
features.implementation: record CPU-only proxy timing and do not claim GPU headroom
features.validation: timings.json has gpuTimingUnavailable=true and gpuTimingLabel=CPU-only proxy
metricThresholds: gpu timing not reported as zero
